hero.title:
Building Software
That Matters
hero.description: We are a software enterprise crafting powerful digital solutions. From cloud infrastructure to AI-driven platforms — we build technology that drives business forward.
about.title: About tria
about.description1: Founded in Costa Rica, tria is a software enterprise built by engineers who believe great technology starts with understanding real problems. We design, build, and scale digital products that simplify complexity and drive measurable outcomes.
about.description2: Our team spans cloud architecture, full-stack development, AI/ML, and cybersecurity — working together to deliver enterprise-grade solutions. Every project begins with a question: how can we make this simpler, faster, and more reliable?
about.quote: Crafted in Costa Rica, Engineered for the World: Software That Delivers
services.softwareDevDesc: Custom web and mobile applications built with modern architectures and best practices.
services.cloudDevopsDesc: Scalable cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and automated deployments.
services.aiMlDesc: Intelligent systems, predictive models, and data-driven automation for your business.
services.itCybersecurityDesc: Security audits, risk assessments, and strategic technology planning.
process.title: Our Process
process.intro: We follow a rigorous, transparent process that ensures every project is delivered on time, within scope, and beyond expectations.
process.step1Desc: We start by understanding your business, users, and goals. Deep research, stakeholder interviews, and technical audits inform a clear product roadmap.
process.step2Desc: Our architects design scalable, maintainable systems. We prototype interfaces and validate technical decisions before a single line of production code is written.
process.step3Desc: Agile sprints with continuous client feedback. We ship incrementally, test rigorously, and adapt quickly — ensuring quality at every stage of development.
process.step4Desc: We deploy to production with zero-downtime strategies, monitor performance, and provide ongoing support to scale your product as your business grows.
featured.title: Featured Projects
team.title: Meet the Team
team.description1: We are engineers, architects, and problem solvers who thrive on building software that works. Every member of our team brings deep technical expertise and a shared commitment to quality.
team.description2: From cloud infrastructure to frontend interfaces, our diverse skills combine to deliver robust, scalable solutions for every client.

blog.title: Latest Insights
blog.post1Desc: A deep dive into our engineering approach for designing, deploying, and orchestrating microservices that handle millions of requests with minimal latency and maximum reliability.
blog.post2Desc: How serverless computing, edge networks, and Kubernetes are reshaping enterprise infrastructure — and what your organization should be doing to prepare for the next wave.
techstack.title: Our Stack
techstack.intro: We use battle-tested, modern technologies to build reliable, scalable systems — choosing the right tool for each problem.
techstack.footer: We use the right tool for every job — from frontend to infrastructure.
footer.description: We design, build, and scale exceptional software solutions with engineering precision.
